versions.version_description: The interlude is completely rewritten on the chords and sounds much more like the original than the existing chord contributions.
Original tabbed out with the help of this tutorial. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JFimkHUAB8w changed chords and added small transition.
I couldn't find a version where the chords on the 3rd verse sounds similar to the orignal song so I made a few changes and tried to keep this version easier to the beginners.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Slow Dancing In A Burning Room
Waiting On The World To Change

content:
Daughters
Capo: 2nd Fret
Strum: D,U,U,D


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
I know a girl[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G7[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
She puts the color inside of my world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
but she's just like a maze[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G7[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Where all of the walls are continually changed[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
And I've done all I can[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G7[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
To stand on her steps with my heart in my hand[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Now I'm starting to see[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G7[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Maybe it's got nothing to do with me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]G7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Fathers, be good to your daughters[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Daughters will love like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Girls become lovers who turn into mothers[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
So mothers, be good to your daughters too[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
Ooh, you see that skin?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G7[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
It's the same she's been standing in[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Since the day she saw him walking away[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G7[/ch]
Now she's left[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
cleaning up the mess he made[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
So fathers, be good to your daughters[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Daughters will love like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Girls become lovers who turn into mothers[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
So mothers, be good to your daughters too[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Boys, you can break[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G7[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
You find out how much they can take[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Boys will be strong[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
And boys soldier on[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G7[/ch]
But boys would be gone without warmth from[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G7[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
A wooooman's good, good heart[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
On behalf of every man[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
looking out for every girl[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G7[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
You are the guide and the weight of her world[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
So fathers, be good to your daughters[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Daughters will love like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Girls become lovers who turn into mothers[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So mothers be good to your daughters, too[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So mothers be good to your daughters, too[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So mothers be good to your daughters, too.[/tab]
